journal_entries.ai_summary: Clean VWAP reclaim, but late scaling increased risk.
journal_entries.entry_reason: Pulled back to VWAP after trend held.
journal_entries.lesson_learned: Best entry was the first confirmed reclaim, not the extended follow-through.
journal_entries.mistakes: Scaled late after the second candle.

journal_entries.ai_summary: News risk was high and confirmation was weak.
journal_entries.entry_reason: Entered after a large green candle.
journal_entries.lesson_learned: Avoid first-candle entries on headline moves.
journal_entries.mistakes: Chased news and did not wait for VWAP confirmation.

journal_entries.ai_summary: Good structure with room to improve sizing.
journal_entries.entry_reason: Rejected prior high with volume fading.
journal_entries.exit_reason: Took partial target in elevated volatility.
journal_entries.lesson_learned: Size down when volatility is elevated.
journal_entries.mistakes: Stop was defined but position size was slightly aggressive.

analysis.beginner_explanation: A chart screenshot is useful for reviewing context, but it should not replace a written plan.
analysis.disclaimer: TradePulse is for trading research, education, journaling, and market organization. It is not financial advice, does not guarantee results, and does not place trades for you. Always paper trade first and make your own final decisions.
analysis.indicator_notes: Record which indicators are visible, whether price is extended from VWAP, and whether volume confirms the move.
analysis.risk_of_chasing: Review whether the candle is extended from VWAP before entering.
analysis.support_resistance: Mark the nearest visible support, resistance, VWAP, and prior high/low before deciding whether the setup is clean.
analysis.trend_summary: demo-chart.png is saved for demo review. Real image AI is not connected yet, so this response focuses on the review checklist rather than claiming to see the chart.

analysis.beginner_explanation: This demo review does not inspect image pixels yet. It turns your screenshot notes into a safer chart-review checklist until real image AI is connected.
confirmation_questions: Where is invalidation on the screenshot?
What level would prove the setup is not working?
Is price extended from VWAP or the nearest support/resistance?
Is there any headline or event risk before this paper setup?
analysis.disclaimer: TradePulse is for trading research, education, journaling, and market organization. It is not financial advice, does not guarantee results, and does not place trades for you. Always paper trade first and make your own final decisions.
analysis.indicator_notes: Indicators mentioned: VWAP, VOLUME. Confirm they support the setup instead of only decorating the chart.
analysis.journal_prompt: Save the screenshot with one sentence for trend, one for levels, one for invalidation, and one mistake to avoid.

limit_check.message: Screenshot reviews is Included on All Access.

analysis.risk_of_chasing: Chasing risk is elevated from your notes. Wait for confirmation, a pullback, or a clearer invalidation area in paper practice.
analysis.support_resistance: Your notes reference levels. Mark the nearest support, resistance, prior high/low, and the exact invalidation level before calling the setup clean.
analysis.trend_summary: SPY has bullish context in your notes. Treat the screenshot as a planning review: confirm trend, distance from VWAP, and invalidation before considering any paper setup.

screenshot_reviews.notes: Breakout above VWAP near resistance with strong volume.

alerts_to_review: SPY: SPY alert is ready for review. Current demo price is 548.42; condition is price above 540.0.
avoid_conditions: Chasing large candles far from VWAP without written invalidation.
Adding a plan after emotional losses or missed moves.
Treating any score, alert, or AI note as financial advice.
plan.market_notes: Start with broad-market context, then review watchlist names one by one.
pre_trade_checks: Before any new setup, write entry, stop, target, and invalidation first.
Review this repeated mistake: Stop was defined but position size was slightly aggressive.
Compare the next paper plan against your saved strategy rules.
plan.risk_notes: Conservative mode: cap paper plans at 3 for the day and pause after 2 losses.
rules_for_today: Write the setup, stop, target, and invalidation before saving a paper plan.
Check scheduled news and wait at least 15 minutes around high-impact events.
Use alerts and screenshots as review prompts, not trade instructions.
plan.session_goal: Practice cleaner entries and avoid chasing.

session_plans.risk_notes: Keep risk small and paper trade only

items.notes: Index is balanced; clean entries need confirmation near prior high.
